content.rendered:
Learn English with Flexible Programmes

Apply to join Global College today >

Explore courses at the Global Technical College>

Explore events at the Global Technical College >

Ready to take your communication skills to the next level? Whether you’re starting fresh, polishing advanced grammar, or preparing for academic and professional success, our programmes are designed to help you learn English in a structured, affordable, and impactful way.

Why Learn English at Global Technical College?

Affordable monthly and term-based tuition fees.

Tailored for beginners, advanced learners, and professionals.

Small class sizes for personalized attention.

Flexible study options, including foundation courses and public speaking.

A proven pathway to fluency and confidence.

General English Levels

Perfect for beginners and intermediate learners who want to learn English for everyday communication.

  • Levels: Starter / Elementary / Pre-Intermediate / Intermediate
  • Fees: KES 12,000 per term or KES 4,000 per month

Build strong grammar and vocabulary.
Improve listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills.
Gain confidence in real-life conversations.

Advanced English Levels

  • For learners aiming to refine fluency and professional communication.
  • Levels: Upper Intermediate / Advanced English
  • Fees: KES 15,000 per term or KES 5,000 per month

Master advanced grammar and expressions
Strengthen academic and workplace communication.
Prepare for higher education or international careers.

Professional English

Specialized programmes designed for professionals who need practical English skills.

  • Options: Academic IELTS / Business English / Report Writing Skills
  • Fees: KES 21,000 per term or KES 7,000 per month

Master advanced grammar and expressions
Strengthen academic and workplace communication.
Prepare for higher education or international careers.

 

Foundation Studies

Bridge your English with additional skills to prepare for school, work, or life abroad.

  • ESL & ICT – KES 6,000 per month
  • ESL & Kiswahili – KES 6,000 per month
  • ESL, Math & Kiswahili – KES 7,000 per month

Build both language and technical skills.
Perfect for students preparing for further studies.

 

Public Speaking Course

Boost your confidence on stage and in life.

  • Duration: 3 months
  • Fees: KES 21,000 in full

Master presentation skills.
Speak fluently in front of any audience.
Gain confidence that lasts a lifetime.

Tuition Fees at a Glance

Eastleigh, 2nd Avenue, Section 1 Eastleigh, Nairobi – Kenya

+254799925625 info@globalcollege.ac.ke

Mon – Fri 9:00A.M. – 5:00P.M.

Apply now

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.

Ronald

Principal
